Applying to 11100110
Input
0 1
1 1
2 1
3 0
4 0
5 1
6 1
7 0
Output
0 I4 = 0
1 I5 = 1
2 XOR60 = XOR(1,1) = 0
3 XOR71 = XOR(0,1) = 1

\boxed{01011001}
